_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of distributed computing concepts relevant to data processing at scale, including data partitioning strategies, parallel execution models, fault tolerance mechanisms, data locality optimization, and the CAP theorem.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI TF domain. TF-K-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-K-019 (AI, cosine: 0.374), OP-T-009 (OP, cosine: 0.370).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.4/10 (raw 0.338). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [algorithms, custom, program] vs WIDAI-only terms [cap, computing, concepts, data, distributed, execution] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.868 (P=0.909, R=0.830). P exceeds R by 0.079 — the DCWF element's 3 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 28 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Program custom algorithms." and "Knowledge of distributed computing concepts relevant to data processing at scale" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.379 ≈ STS 0.338 (gap 0.041). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [none] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 0.0%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [algorithms, custom, program]. WIDAI terms: [cap, computing, concepts, data, distributed, execution].
